title: Fix skill installer: copy files instead of creating symlink
description:
The skill installer creates a symlink pointing to a temp directory instead of copying files directly. This causes broken symlinks after macOS cleans up /var/folders.

GitHub Issue: https://github.com/oliveagle/dotvault/issues/1

Fix: Change the installer to copy/move SKILL.md directly to ~/.agents/skills/dotvault/ instead of creating a symlink to temp dir.
